functions.name: P365.PVT.Z.ByDAK
functions.description: Gas Z-factor by Dranchuk-Abou-Kassem (DAK) correlation. Valid 1.0 ≤ Tpr ≤ 3.0; 0.2 ≤ Ppr ≤ 30.

functions.name: P365.PVT.Z.ByBrillBeggs
functions.description: Gas Z-factor by Brill-Beggs explicit correlation (no iteration). Good for 1.15 ≤ Tpr ≤ 2.4; Ppr ≤ 15.

functions.name: P365.PVT.Z.ByHallYarborough
functions.description: Gas Z-factor by Hall-Yarborough iterative method (highly accurate).

functions.name: P365.PVT.PseudoCritical.ByLeeKesler
functions.description: Gas pseudo-critical temperature (°R) and pressure (psia) from specific gravity using Lee-Kesler correlation. Returns [Tpc, Ppc].

functions.name: P365.PVT.Pb.ByStanding
functions.description: Oil bubble point pressure by Standing correlation (1947).

functions.name: P365.PVT.Pb.ByVasquezBeggs
functions.description: Oil bubble point pressure by Vasquez-Beggs correlation (1980).

functions.name: P365.PVT.SG.Oil.FromAPI
functions.description: Convert API gravity to oil specific gravity.

functions.name: P365.DCA.Arps.Rate
functions.description: Arps hyperbolic decline rate at time t. b=0 → exponential; b=1 → harmonic.

functions.name: P365.DCA.Arps.Cumulative
functions.description: Arps hyperbolic cumulative production from t=0 to t.

functions.name: P365.DCA.Arps.Fit
functions.description: Fit Arps decline parameters [Qi, Di, b] to production history. Returns spill array [Qi, Di, b].

functions.name: P365.DCA.Duong.Rate
functions.description: Duong decline rate for unconventional reservoirs (transient linear flow).

functions.name: P365.UnitConverter
functions.description: Convert a value between any two petroleum engineering units. Supports 1500+ units, scaled units (e.g. '640 acre'), and unit expressions (e.g. 'bbl*psi/day').

functions.name: P365.Pipe.Weymouth.Flow
functions.description: Natural gas flow rate using Weymouth equation (SCFH).

functions.name: P365.Pipe.Weymouth.OutletPressure
functions.description: Outlet pressure using Weymouth equation (psia).

functions.name: P365.PVT.Ug
functions.description: Gas viscosity by Lee-Gonzalez-Eakin correlation (cp).

functions.name: P365.PVT.Bg
functions.description: Gas formation volume factor (res bbl/scf).

functions.name: P365.DCA.TransientHyperbolic.Rate
functions.description: Transient Hyperbolic decline rate at time t. Uses Arps hyperbolic (b > 1 allowed for transient flow) transitioning to exponential at terminal decline Dterm.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: Hyperbolic exponent (1.5–2.0 for transient linear flow)

functions.name: P365.DCA.TransientHyperbolic.Cumulative
functions.description: Transient Hyperbolic cumulative production from t = 0 to t.

functions.name: P365.DCA.TransientHyperbolic.SwitchTime
functions.description: Time at which Transient Hyperbolic switches from hyperbolic to exponential decline.

functions.name: P365.DCA.TransientHyperbolic.EUR
functions.description: Estimated Ultimate Recovery for Transient Hyperbolic decline to economic limit.

functions.name: P365.DCA.ExtendedExponential.Rate
functions.description: Extended Exponential (biexponential) decline rate. q(t) = qi*[f*exp(-Dfast*t) + (1-f)*exp(-Dslow*t)].

functions.name: P365.DCA.ExtendedExponential.Cumulative
functions.description: Extended Exponential cumulative production from t = 0 to t.

functions.name: P365.DCA.ExtendedExponential.EUR
functions.description: Extended Exponential EUR to economic limit (bisection solve).

functions.name: P365.DCA.AKB.Rate
functions.description: Ansah-Knowles-Buba (AKB) generalized decline rate. q(t) = qi*[1+(K-1)*Di*t]^(-1/(K-1)). K=1→exponential; K=2→harmonic.

functions.name: P365.DCA.AKB.Cumulative
functions.description: Ansah-Knowles-Buba (AKB) cumulative production from t = 0 to t.

functions.name: P365.DCA.AKB.EUR
functions.description: Ansah-Knowles-Buba EUR to economic limit.

functions.name: P365.DCA.Conversions.ConvertNominalDecline
functions.description: Convert nominal decline rate between time bases (year/month/day).

parameters.name: fromUnit
parameters.description: Source time unit: year | month | day

parameters.name: toUnit
parameters.description: Target time unit: year | month | day

functions.name: P365.DCA.Conversions.AnnualToMonthlyEffective
functions.description: Convert effective annual decline rate to effective monthly rate. De_monthly = 1 - (1 - De_annual)^(1/12).

functions.name: P365.DCA.Conversions.MonthlyToAnnualEffective
functions.description: Convert effective monthly decline rate to effective annual rate. De_annual = 1 - (1 - De_monthly)^12.

functions.name: P365.WBI.Burst.Rating
functions.description: API Barlow internal-yield (burst) pressure rating. P_burst = 0.875 * 2 * Yp * t / OD.

functions.name: P365.WBI.Burst.DesignFactor
functions.description: Casing burst or collapse design factor: DF = P_rating / P_applied.

functions.name: P365.WBI.Burst.RequiredRating
functions.description: Minimum required casing burst rating given operating pressure and design factor.

functions.name: P365.WBI.Collapse.DtRatio
functions.description: D/t ratio (OD / wall thickness) — key parameter for collapse regime.

functions.name: P365.WBI.Collapse.ElasticP
functions.description: Elastic collapse pressure for thin-wall casing. P_el = 2E/(1-nu²)*(t/OD)³.

functions.name: P365.WBI.Collapse.YieldP
functions.description: Yield collapse pressure for thick-wall casing. P_yp = 2*Yp*(D/t-1)/(D/t)².

functions.name: P365.WBI.Collapse.Rating
functions.description: Conservative API-style collapse rating (minimum of elastic and yield values).

functions.name: P365.WBI.Tensile.BuoyancyFactor
functions.description: Buoyancy factor for tubular in drilling fluid. BF = 1 - rho_fluid / rho_steel.

functions.name: P365.WBI.Tensile.EffectiveWeight
functions.description: Effective (in-fluid) weight of a casing string. W_eff = W_air * BF.

functions.name: P365.WBI.Tensile.Rating
functions.description: Pipe body tensile capacity. F = pi/4 * (OD² - ID²) * Yp.

functions.name: P365.WBI.Cement.Volume
functions.description: Annular cement slurry volume (bbl) between two concentric tubulars.

functions.name: P365.WBI.Cement.MinTop
functions.description: Minimum top of cement depth (ft TVD) from pressure balance with pore gradient.

functions.name: P365.WBI.Cement.SlurryDensity
functions.description: Class G neat cement slurry density (ppg) from water content (gal per 94-lb sack).

parameters.name: gal_water_per_sack
parameters.description: Water per sack (gal/sack); Class G neat = 4.3

functions.name: P365.WBI.Cement.ReturnHeight
functions.description: Cement column height (ft) from placed slurry volume.

functions.name: P365.WBI.ShoeTest.FITEquivalentMW
functions.description: Equivalent mud weight (ppg) from surface pressure during FIT/LOT. EMW = MW + P_surf / (0.052 * TVD).

functions.name: P365.WBI.ShoeTest.FITSurfacePressure
functions.description: Surface pressure required to reach a target FIT/LOT equivalent density.

functions.name: P365.WBI.MudWindow
functions.description: Drilling mud weight window (MW_min, MW_max, window_ppg, adequate). Returns 4-element array.

functions.name: P365.WBI.HydrostaticPressure
functions.description: Hydrostatic pressure at depth from fluid column. P = 0.052 * MW * TVD (psia).

functions.name: P365.WBI.PressureToEMW
functions.description: Equivalent mud weight from pressure at depth. EMW = P / (0.052 * TVD) (ppg).

functions.name: P365.FRAC.Poroelastic.Closure
functions.description: Minimum horizontal stress from the uniaxial strain / poroelastic model. sigma_h = [nu/(1-nu)]*(sigma_v - alpha*Pp) + alpha*Pp + dSigma_tect. Used as fracture closure pressure estimate.

parameters.name: dSigma_tect_psi
parameters.description: Tectonic stress offset (psi); 0 for uniaxial-strain only

functions.name: P365.FRAC.NetPressure
functions.description: Net treating pressure: P_net = P_treating - sigma_closure - P_friction. Positive P_net drives fracture growth.

functions.name: P365.FRAC.FluidEfficiency
functions.description: Fluid efficiency at end of pumping: eta = V_frac / V_injected (0-1). Indicates what fraction of injected fluid created fracture volume.

functions.name: P365.FRAC.ISIP
functions.description: Bottomhole instantaneous shut-in pressure from surface ISIP. ISIP_BH = P_surface + fluid_density_ppg * 0.052 * TVD_ft.

parameters.name: P_surface_psi
parameters.description: Surface ISIP (psi) — read immediately at shut-in

functions.name: P365.FRAC.Nolte.G
functions.description: Nolte G-function at dimensionless shut-in time deltaT_D = deltaT/tp. G = (4/3)*[(1+deltaT_D)^1.5 - deltaT_D^1.5 - 1]. Used for step-rate test closure analysis.

functions.name: P365.FRAC.Nolte.Closure
functions.description: Fracture closure pressure from Nolte G-function plot. P_closure = P_isip - dPdG * G_closure (psi).

parameters.name: dPdG_psi
parameters.description: Linear slope dP/dG from G-function plot (psi/unit G)

functions.name: P365.FRAC.BreakdownPressure
functions.description: Fracture initiation / breakdown pressure: P_bd = sigma_h + T0 - P_pore. Based on Hubbert-Willis tensile failure criterion.

functions.name: P365.SIM.SWOF
functions.description: Generate Eclipse SWOF keyword INCLUDE file content from a water-oil saturation table (Sw, krw, krow, Pcow). Returns formatted string ready for Eclipse DATA file.

parameters.name: rows
parameters.description: Array of SWOF table rows [{Sw, krw, krow, Pcow}, ...]

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Optional comment header for the block

functions.name: P365.SIM.SGOF
functions.description: Generate Eclipse SGOF keyword INCLUDE file content from a gas-oil saturation table (Sg, krg, krog, Pcgo). Returns formatted string ready for Eclipse DATA file.

parameters.name: rows
parameters.description: Array of SGOF table rows [{Sg, krg, krog, Pcgo}, ...]

functions.name: P365.SIM.PVDG
functions.description: Generate Eclipse PVDG (dry gas PVT) keyword INCLUDE file content. Columns: P(psia) | Bg(bbl/Mscf) | Ug(cp).

parameters.name: rows
parameters.description: Array of PVDG rows [{P, Bg, Ug}, ...]

functions.name: P365.SIM.PVTW
functions.description: Generate Eclipse PVTW (water PVT) keyword. Format: P_ref | Bw | Cw | Uw | dUw/dP.

functions.name: P365.SIM.BuildSwofTable
functions.description: Build a SWOF table using Corey power-law kr correlations. Returns array of {Sw, krw, krow, Pcow=0} rows ready for simSWOF().

functions.name: P365.SIM.BuildSgofTable
functions.description: Build a SGOF table using Corey power-law kr correlations. Returns array of {Sg, krg, krog, Pcgo=0} rows ready for simSGOF().

functions.name: P365.SIM.GenerateFromTemplate
functions.description: Render a simulation input file from a template with @TOKEN placeholders. Implements the File Generator workflow for Eclipse, CMG, and any text-based simulator input.

functions.name: P365.PVT.PseudoCritical.ByKays
functions.description: Gas pseudo-critical properties from composition using Kay's mixing rule. Returns [Tpc (degrees R), Ppc (psia)].

functions.name: P365.PVT.SourGas.WichertAziz
functions.description: Wichert-Aziz (1972) sour gas correction to pseudo-critical properties. Returns [Tpc_corrected (degrees R), Ppc_corrected (psia)].

functions.name: P365.PVT.Ug.ByLee
functions.description: Gas viscosity by Lee-Gonzalez-Eakin (1966) correlation (cp).

functions.name: P365.PVT.Density.Gas
functions.description: Gas density (lb/ft3) from Z-factor, pressure, temperature, and molecular weight.

functions.name: P365.PVT.Cg.Gas
functions.description: Gas compressibility (1/psi) at given conditions using numerical dZ/dP method.

functions.name: P365.PVT.SG.Oil.ToAPI
functions.description: Convert oil specific gravity to API gravity.

functions.name: P365.PVT.Rs.ByStanding
functions.description: Solution GOR (scf/STB) by Standing (1947) correlation at given pressure.

functions.name: P365.PVT.Rs.ByVasquezBeggs
functions.description: Solution GOR (scf/STB) by Vasquez-Beggs (1980) correlation.

functions.name: P365.PVT.Bo.Sat.ByStanding
functions.description: Saturated oil FVF (bbl/STB) at or below bubble point by Standing (1947).

functions.name: P365.PVT.Bo.Sat.ByVasquezBeggs
functions.description: Saturated oil FVF (bbl/STB) at or below bubble point by Vasquez-Beggs (1980).

functions.name: P365.PVT.Bo.Undersat
functions.description: Undersaturated oil FVF (bbl/STB) above bubble point using compressibility correction.

functions.name: P365.PVT.Co.ByVasquezBeggs
functions.description: Oil compressibility (1/psi) above bubble point by Vasquez-Beggs (1980).

functions.name: P365.PVT.Uo.Dead.ByBeal
functions.description: Dead oil viscosity (cp) at reservoir temperature by Beal (1946) correlation.

functions.name: P365.PVT.Uo.Sat.ByBeggsRobinson
functions.description: Saturated oil viscosity (cp) by Beggs-Robinson (1975) correlation.

functions.name: P365.PVT.Bw
functions.description: Water formation volume factor (bbl/STB) by McCain (1990) correlation.

functions.name: P365.PVT.Uw
functions.description: Water viscosity (cp) by McCain (1990) correlation.

functions.name: P365.PVT.Cw
functions.description: Water compressibility (1/psi) by McCain (1990) correlation.

functions.name: P365.IPR.PI
functions.description: Productivity Index PI = q / (Pr - Pwf) (STB/d/psi or Mscfd/psi).

functions.name: P365.IPR.Rate.Darcy
functions.description: Darcy inflow rate q = PI x (Pr - Pwf).

functions.name: P365.IPR.PI.PSS
functions.description: Pseudo-steady-state PI: kh / [141.2 x mu x Bo x (ln(re/rw) - 0.75 + S)] (STB/d/psi).

functions.name: P365.IPR.Rate.Vogel
functions.description: Vogel (1968) IPR rate below bubble point: q = Qmax x [1 - 0.2 x (Pwf/Pr) - 0.8 x (Pwf/Pr)^2] (STB/d).

functions.name: P365.IPR.Qmax.Vogel
functions.description: Vogel back-calculation of Qmax from a test rate at a given Pwf.

functions.name: P365.IPR.Rate.Composite
functions.description: Composite IPR (Darcy above Pb + Vogel below Pb). Returns rate at given Pwf (STB/d).

functions.name: P365.IPR.Rate.Fetkovich
functions.description: Fetkovich empirical backpressure IPR: q = C x (Pr^2 - Pwf^2)^n (Mscfd).

functions.name: P365.IPR.Rate.GasDarcy
functions.description: Gas well Darcy deliverability (PSS, field units). Returns rate (Mscfd).

functions.name: P365.IPR.PI.Horizontal.Joshi
functions.description: Horizontal well PI by Joshi (1988) correlation (STB/d/psi).

functions.name: P365.MBE.Gas.PZ
functions.description: Gas reservoir p/Z ratio from reservoir pressure and Z-factor.

functions.name: P365.MBE.Gas.OGIP.TwoPoint
functions.description: OGIP from two-point p/Z MBE regression (Mscf or Bcf).

functions.name: P365.MBE.Gas.Pressure.Forecast
functions.description: Forecast reservoir pressure at cumulative gas production Gp using p/Z MBE.

functions.name: P365.MBE.Oil.Eo
functions.description: Oil expansion term Eo (bbl/STB) for oil MBE.

functions.name: P365.MBE.Oil.F
functions.description: Underground withdrawal F (reservoir bbl) from oil, water, gas production.

functions.name: P365.MBE.Oil.HavlenaOdeh
functions.description: Havlena-Odeh (1963) straight-line MBE. Returns [OOIP (STB), gas cap fraction m, R2].

parameters.name: F_arr
parameters.description: Array of underground withdrawals F (res bbl)

parameters.name: Eo_arr
parameters.description: Array of oil expansion terms Eo (bbl/STB)

parameters.name: Eg_arr
parameters.description: Array of gas cap expansion terms Eg (bbl/STB)

parameters.name: Efw_arr
parameters.description: Array of formation/water expansion terms Efw (bbl/STB)

functions.name: P365.MBE.Oil.DriveIndices
functions.description: Calculate drive mechanism indices: solution gas, gas cap, water, compressibility. Returns [Iso, Ig, Iw, Ic].

functions.name: P365.PTA.Drawdown.Pwf
functions.description: Drawdown flowing BHP by semilog (MDH) approximation (psia).

functions.name: P365.PTA.Horner.Permeability
functions.description: Permeability from Horner buildup slope: k = 162.6 x q x mu x Bo / (m x h) (md).

functions.name: P365.PTA.Horner.Skin
functions.description: Skin from Horner buildup analysis (dimensionless).

parameters.name: P1hr
parameters.description: Pressure at 1 hour on Horner plot (psia)

functions.name: P365.PTA.Horner.Pstar
functions.description: Extrapolated initial reservoir pressure P* from Horner plot (psia).

functions.name: P365.PTA.Bourdet.Derivative
functions.description: Bourdet pressure derivative dp/d(ln t) array - key diagnostic for flow regime identification.

parameters.name: L
parameters.description: Smoothing parameter (0.1-0.3 typical, 0 for no smoothing)

functions.name: P365.PTA.WBS.Coefficient
functions.description: Wellbore storage coefficient C (bbl/psi) from wellbore fluid compressibility and volume.

functions.name: P365.PTA.Fault.Buildup
functions.description: Buildup pressure near sealing fault using image well method (psia).

functions.name: P365.GEO.PorePressure.Eaton
functions.description: Eaton (1975) pore pressure prediction from sonic transit time (psia).

functions.name: P365.GEO.FractureGradient.Eaton
functions.description: Eaton (1975) fracture gradient (psi/ft) - most widely used method.

functions.name: P365.GEO.MudWindow
functions.description: Drilling mud weight window [min collapse, min kick, max fracture, max overburden] (ppg).

functions.name: P365.GEO.MinHorizontalStress
functions.description: Minimum horizontal stress (psi) using Eaton uniaxial strain and poroelastic correction.

parameters.name: sigma_tect
parameters.description: Tectonic stress addition (psi, use 0 if unknown)

functions.name: P365.GEO.UCS.FromYoungsModulus
functions.description: Unconfined compressive strength UCS (MPa) from dynamic Young's modulus - Chang et al. correlation.

functions.name: P365.GEO.MohrCoulomb
functions.description: Mohr-Coulomb shear strength (psi): tau = C + sigma_n x tan(phi).

functions.name: P365.SKIN.Hawkins
functions.description: Hawkins (1956) damage skin: S = (k/ks - 1) x ln(rs/rw).

functions.name: P365.SKIN.Perforation.KarakasTariq
functions.description: Karakas-Tariq (1991) perforation skin from phasing, SPF, penetration depth, wellbore and damaged zone parameters.

functions.name: P365.SKIN.NonDarcyD
functions.description: Non-Darcy rate coefficient D ((Mscfd)^-1) for turbulent skin in gas wells.

functions.name: P365.SKIN.NonDarcySkin
functions.description: Rate-dependent (non-Darcy) skin contribution: S_nd = D x q.

functions.name: P365.SKIN.PartialPenetration
functions.description: Papatzacos (1987) partial penetration skin for incomplete perforation interval.

parameters.name: zw_ft
parameters.description: Mid-perforation depth from top of pay (ft)

functions.name: P365.SKIN.Total
functions.description: Composite total skin = Hawkins damage + perforations + non-Darcy + partial penetration + gravel pack.

functions.name: P365.SKIN.StimulationRatio
functions.description: Post/pre-stimulation PI ratio: SR = (ln(re/rw) - 0.75 + S_pre) / (ln(re/rw) - 0.75 + S_post).

functions.name: P365.HV.HHV
functions.description: Higher Heating Value (BTU/scf) of a gas mixture by GPA 2145 component data.

parameters.name: components
parameters.description: Component name strings array (e.g. C1, C2, N2, CO2)

functions.name: P365.HV.LHV
functions.description: Lower Heating Value (BTU/scf) of a gas mixture by GPA 2145 component data.

functions.name: P365.HV.Wobbe
functions.description: Wobbe Index = HHV / sqrt(SG) (BTU/scf). Higher Wobbe means more energy per unit volume through a fixed orifice.

functions.name: P365.HV.Analysis
functions.description: Complete gas composition analysis. Returns [MW, SG, HHV (BTU/scf), LHV (BTU/scf), Wobbe].

functions.name: P365.AGA8.Z
functions.description: AGA-8 (1994) Z-factor for custody transfer gas metering (SI: MPa, K).

functions.name: P365.AGA8.Z.FieldUnits
functions.description: AGA-8 Z-factor in field units (psia, degrees F). Wrapper around the SI AGA-8 implementation.

functions.name: P365.VFP.BeggsBrillBHP
functions.description: Beggs-Brill (1973) bottomhole pressure for multiphase vertical/deviated flow (psia).

functions.name: P365.VFP.Turner.CriticalVelocity
functions.description: Turner et al. (1969) critical gas velocity for liquid unloading (ft/s).

functions.name: P365.VFP.Turner.MinCriticalRate
functions.description: Minimum gas rate for liquid unloading (Mscfd) from Turner critical velocity.

functions.name: P365.SF.Choke.Rate
functions.description: Choke flow rate (STB/d) using a selectable critical flow correlation (Gilbert, Ros, Baxendell, Achong, Pilehvari).

parameters.name: bean_64ths
parameters.description: Choke bean size (64ths of an inch)

parameters.name: correlation
parameters.description: Correlation name: Gilbert, Ros, Baxendell, Achong, or Pilehvari

functions.name: P365.SF.Compressor.Power
functions.description: Compressor polytropic power (hp) for gas compression.

parameters.name: gamma
parameters.description: Specific heat ratio Cp/Cv (e.g. 1.3 for natural gas)

functions.name: P365.SCAL.Corey.Krw
functions.description: Corey power-law water relative permeability krw at water saturation Sw.

functions.name: P365.SCAL.Corey.Kro
functions.description: Corey power-law oil relative permeability kro at water saturation Sw.

functions.name: P365.SCAL.LeverettJ
functions.description: Leverett J-function: J = Pc x sqrt(k/phi) / (sigma x cos(theta)). Used for cross-rock capillary pressure scaling.

functions.name: P365.SCAL.BL.FractionalFlow
functions.description: Buckley-Leverett fractional flow fw(Sw) at a water saturation point.

functions.name: P365.DCA.Diagnostics.BFactor
functions.description: Instantaneous Arps b-factor array from rate-time data - flow regime diagnostic.

parameters.name: q_arr
parameters.description: Rate array (same units as decline model)

functions.name: P365.DCA.Diagnostics.LogLogDeriv
functions.description: Log-log derivative d(log q)/d(log t) for flow regime identification on a diagnostic plot.

functions.name: P365.DCA.Diagnostics.FlowRegime
functions.description: Classify Arps flow regime from b-factor: exponential (b~0), hyperbolic, harmonic (b~1), or transient linear (b~2).

functions.name: P365.DCA.PLE.Rate
functions.description: Power Law Exponential (PLE) decline rate q(t) = qi x exp(-D_inf x t - (D1-D_inf)/n x t^n).

functions.name: P365.DCA.SEPD.Rate
functions.description: Stretched Exponential Production Decline rate q(t) = qi x exp(-(t/tau)^n).

functions.name: P365.DCA.LGM.EUR
functions.description: Logistic Growth Model EUR (ultimate): K carrying capacity = total recoverable reserves.

functions.name: P365.ECLIPSE.ParseSmspec
functions.description: Parse Eclipse .SMSPEC binary specification file. Returns structured header with keywords, wgnames, nums, units arrays.

parameters.name: fileBuffer
parameters.description: ArrayBuffer of the .SMSPEC binary file content

functions.name: P365.ECLIPSE.FormatResults
functions.description: Format parsed Eclipse summary data into a 2D table array for Excel worksheet output. First row is headers, subsequent rows are time-series data.

parameters.name: smspecHeader
parameters.description: Parsed SMSPEC header object from ParseSmspec

functions.name: SPLINE.LINEAR
functions.description: Piecewise linear interpolation at a query point. Extrapolates linearly outside the data range.

functions.name: SPLINE.CUBIC
functions.description: Natural cubic spline interpolation at a query point (zero curvature boundary conditions).

functions.name: SPLINE.CUBIC.DERIV
functions.description: First derivative of a natural cubic spline at a query point (dy/dx).

functions.name: SPLINE.CUBIC.INTEGRAL
functions.description: Definite integral of a natural cubic spline from xa to xb.

functions.name: SPLINE.PCHIP
functions.description: Monotone PCHIP interpolation (Fritsch-Carlson). Preserves monotonicity — no overshoot on step data.

functions.name: SPLINE.PCHIP.INVERSE
functions.description: Find x such that PCHIP(x) = yTarget (Brent root-finding). Returns NaN if not found.

functions.name: SPLINE.BILINEAR
functions.description: 2-D bilinear interpolation on a regular grid.

parameters.name: Z
parameters.description: 2-D value table Z[i][j] as a JSON array of arrays

functions.name: ECO.NPV
functions.description: Net Present Value: NPV = Σ CF[t]/(1+r)^t. Returns project NPV in same currency as cashFlows.

functions.name: ECO.IRR
functions.description: Internal Rate of Return — rate r that makes NPV=0. Returns NaN if no root found.

parameters.name: cashFlows
parameters.description: Periodic cash flows (must have sign change)

functions.name: ECO.MIRR
functions.description: Modified IRR: reinvests positives at financeRate, discounts negatives at reinvestRate.

parameters.name: financeRate
parameters.description: Rate used to compound positive flows

parameters.name: reinvestRate
parameters.description: Rate used to discount negative flows

functions.name: ECO.PAYOUT.SIMPLE
functions.description: Simple (undiscounted) payout period — number of periods for cumulative CF to turn positive.

functions.name: ECO.PAYOUT.DISCOUNTED
functions.description: Discounted payout period — periods for discounted cumulative CF to turn positive.

functions.name: ECO.OIL.ECONOMIC.LIMIT
functions.description: Minimum economic rate (STB/month) where gross revenue = lifting cost.

functions.name: ECO.ARPS.EUR.AT.LIMIT
functions.description: Arps decline EUR at economic limit: cumulative production from qi until rate reaches qEL.

parameters.name: qEL
parameters.description: Economic limit rate (same units as qi)

functions.name: ECO.TIME.TO.ECONOMIC.LIMIT
functions.description: Time for Arps decline to reach economic limit rate qEL.

functions.name: ECO.PROFITABILITY.INDEX
functions.description: Profitability Index (PI = (NPV + CAPEX) / CAPEX). PI > 1 is value-creating.

functions.name: ECO.BREAK.EVEN.PRICE
functions.description: Break-even commodity price ($/unit) that makes NPV = 0.

functions.name: WPA.PROPORTIONAL
functions.description: Distribute field rate proportionally by weights (PI, AOF, historical rate, etc.).

functions.name: WPA.CAPACITY.CURTAILMENT
functions.description: Capacity-constrained proration: cap each well at maxRate and redistribute surplus.

functions.name: WPA.RECONCILE
functions.description: Scale metered well rates to match an accurate field-measured total.

functions.name: WPA.VOIDAGE.RATE
functions.description: Total reservoir voidage rate (res bbl/d) from oil, water, and free gas production.

functions.name: WPA.ACTUAL.VRR
functions.description: Actual voidage replacement ratio (VRR = injection_res / voidage_res).

functions.name: WPA.FIELD.SUMMARY
functions.description: Aggregate field production: total oil, water, gas, liquid, water cut, and GOR.

functions.name: ECO.WORKING.INTEREST
functions.description: Calculate working interest (WI) revenue. WI_Revenue = GrossRevenue × WI

functions.name: ECO.NET.REVENUE.INTEREST
functions.description: Calculate Net Revenue Interest (NRI). NRI = WI × (1 - totalRoyalty)

functions.name: ECO.ROYALTY.STACK
functions.description: Calculate net revenue after stacking multiple royalty deductions sequentially

functions.name: ECO.GAS.PRICE.ESCALATION
functions.description: Project gas prices forward with annual escalation rate. Returns array of escalated prices.

functions.name: ECO.INFLATION.ADJUST
functions.description: Adjust real cash flows for inflation to produce nominal cash flows. CF_nominal[t] = CF_real[t] × (1+r)^t

functions.name: ECO.AFTER.TAX.NPV
functions.description: Calculate after-tax NPV using flat income tax rate on positive cash flows

parameters.name: cashFlows
parameters.description: Pre-tax cash flows (positive = income, negative = expense)

functions.name: ECO.AFTER.TAX.NPV.DEPLETION
functions.description: After-tax NPV with UOP depletion shielding. taxable[t] = preTaxCF[t] - depletion[t]

functions.name: ECO.BUILD.ESCALATED.REVENUE
functions.description: Build escalated revenue cash flows: Revenue[t] = volume[t] × price[0] × (1+esc)^t × NRI - OPEX[t]

parameters.name: volumes
parameters.description: Array of production volumes per period

parameters.name: opex
parameters.description: Operating cost per period (scalar or array)

functions.name: ECO.LOE.PER.BOE
functions.description: Calculate lease operating expense per BOE. LOE/BOE = totalOpex / (oilVol + gasVol/BOEperMscf)

functions.name: ECO.RECYCLE.RATIO
functions.description: Calculate CAPEX recycle ratio. RecycleRatio = (Revenue - OPEX) / CAPEX

functions.name: ECO.FINDING.COST
functions.description: Calculate finding and development cost per BOE. F&D = totalCapex / EUR_BOE

functions.name: DCA.SEPD.CUM.SHAPE
functions.description: SEPD cumulative shape ratio: fraction of EUR produced at time t. Shape = 1 - exp(-(t/tau)^n)

functions.name: DCA.LGM.SAT.FRACTION
functions.description: LGM saturation fraction at time t (fraction of EUR produced). Saturation = Gp(t) / K

functions.name: DCA.MODEL.COMPARISON
functions.description: Compare Arps, SEPD, and LGM goodness-of-fit (SSR) on production data. Lower SSR = better fit.

functions.name: DCA.ARPS.EUR.TERMINAL
functions.description: Arps EUR with terminal exponential decline switch. EUR = Gp(t_switch) + q(t_switch)/D_term

functions.name: VFP.ANSARI.GRADIENT
functions.description: Ansari (1994) mechanistic two-phase pressure gradient for upward wellbore flow. Returns psi/ft.

functions.name: VFP.ANSARI.BHP
functions.description: Ansari (1994) mechanistic BHP by integrating pressure gradient over depth. Returns psia.

functions.name: VFP.MUKHERJEE.BRILL.GRADIENT
functions.description: Mukherjee-Brill (1985) two-phase pressure gradient for inclined pipes. Returns psi/ft.

functions.name: VFP.MUKHERJEE.BRILL.BHP
functions.description: Mukherjee-Brill BHP by integrating gradient over depth. Returns psia.

functions.name: VFP.HASAN.KABIR.GRADIENT
functions.description: Hasan-Kabir (1988) drift-flux mechanistic gradient for inclined wellbores. Returns psi/ft.

functions.name: VFP.HASAN.KABIR.BHP
functions.description: Hasan-Kabir BHP by integrating gradient over depth. Returns psia.

functions.name: GEO.ELASTIC.MODULI.CONVERT
functions.description: Convert E and Poisson's ratio to bulk K, shear G, Lamé λ, and P-wave M moduli (all GPa).

functions.name: GEO.ELASTIC.MODULI.FROM.KG
functions.description: Convert bulk modulus K and shear modulus G to Young's modulus E and Poisson's ratio ν.

functions.name: GEO.STATIC.YOUNGS.MODULUS
functions.description: Static Young's modulus from dynamic (Eissa-Kazi 1988). E_static = 0.74·E_dynamic − 0.82 (GPa).

parameters.name: E_dynamic_GPa
parameters.description: Dynamic Young's modulus from sonic log (GPa)

functions.name: GEO.WELLBORE.STRESS.3D
functions.description: Kirsch (1898) effective stresses at borehole wall: σ_r, σ_θ, σ_z, τ_eff (psi). Returns matrix.

functions.name: GEO.COLLAPSE.PRESSURE.3D
functions.description: Mohr-Coulomb borehole collapse pressure from 3D stress state (Kirsch + MC criterion). Returns psi.

functions.name: PVT.IFT.GAS.OIL.BAKER.SWERDLOFF
functions.description: Gas-oil interfacial tension (Baker-Swerdloff 1956) from API gravity, temperature, and solution GOR. Returns dyne/cm.

functions.name: PVT.IFT.GAS.OIL.MACLEOD.SUGDEN
functions.description: Gas-oil IFT from parachors (Macleod-Sugden equation). Returns dyne/cm.

functions.name: PVT.IFT.GAS.BRINE
functions.description: Gas-brine interfacial tension (Jennings-Patzek 1993). Returns dyne/cm.

functions.name: PVT.EOS.PENELOUX.SHIFT
functions.description: Peneloux (1982) volume-shift parameter for PR EoS from Tc, Pc, and acentric factor. Returns ft³/lb-mol.

functions.name: PVT.EOS.VOLUME.SHIFT.REGRESS
functions.description: Regress volume-shift correction from observed and calculated molar volumes (least-squares mean offset).

functions.name: PVT.EOS.BINARY.INTERACTION
functions.description: Chueh-Prausnitz (1967) binary interaction parameter kij from critical volumes. Returns dimensionless kij.

functions.name: ECO.LHS.SAMPLE
functions.description: Latin Hypercube Sample: nSamples × nVars matrix with values in [0,1). Each column is independently stratified.

functions.name: ECO.INV.TRANSFORM
functions.description: Inverse-transform sampling for uniform / triangular / normal / lognormal / PERT distributions.

functions.name: ECO.MONTE.CARLO.NPV
functions.description: Monte Carlo NPV simulation using LHS. Returns {mean, p10, p50, p90, stddev, min, max} statistics.

functions.name: P365.RTA.MaterialBalanceTime
functions.description: Calculate material balance time for a gas well: tc = Gp / q

functions.name: P365.RTA.MaterialBalanceTimeOil
functions.description: Calculate material balance time for an oil well: tc = Np / q

functions.name: P365.RTA.PseudoPressure
functions.description: Real-gas pseudo-pressure m(p) by trapezoidal integration (psia^2/cp)

functions.name: P365.RTA.PseudoPressureDiff
functions.description: Real-gas pseudo-pressure difference Delta-m(p) = m(pi) - m(pwf)

functions.name: P365.RTA.PseudoTime
functions.description: Real-gas pseudo-time t_a = muGi*cti * integral(dt/(mu_g*ct)) (days)

functions.name: P365.RTA.RNP
functions.description: Rate-normalized pressure for gas well: RNP = Delta-m(p) / q (psia^2*d/(cp*Mscf))

functions.name: P365.RTA.RNPOil
functions.description: Rate-normalized pressure for oil well: RNP = (pi - pwf) / q (psia*d/STB)

functions.name: P365.RTA.FMBGas
functions.description: Flowing Material Balance for gas wells: estimates OGIP from RNP vs. material balance time regression

parameters.name: Gp_arr
parameters.description: Cumulative gas production at each point (Mscf)

functions.name: P365.RTA.FMBOil
functions.description: Flowing Material Balance for oil wells: estimates OOIP from RNP vs. material balance time regression

parameters.name: Np_arr
parameters.description: Cumulative oil production at each point (STB)

functions.name: P365.RTA.BPlot
functions.description: Blasingame loss-ratio b-plot diagnostic. Returns array of {t, b, bDot} for flow regime identification

functions.name: P365.RTA.BlassingameDimRate
functions.description: Blasingame dimensionless decline rate q_Dd for type-curve matching

functions.name: P365.RTA.BlassingameDimTime
functions.description: Blasingame dimensionless decline time t_Dd = 0.00633*k*t/(phi*mu*ct*re^2)

functions.name: P365.RTA.RecoveryFactorFMB
functions.description: Gas recovery factor from flowing material balance: RF = Gp / OGIP

parameters.name: OGIP_Mscf
parameters.description: Original gas in place from FMB (Mscf)

functions.name: P365.RTA.PermeabilityFromRNP
functions.description: Permeability from IARF slope of RNP vs. log10(tc) line: k = 1637*T / (m* * h) (mD)

parameters.name: slope_RNP
parameters.description: Slope of RNP vs. log10(tc) (psia^2*d/(cp*Mscf per log-cycle))

functions.name: P365.RTA.SkinFromRNP
functions.description: Skin factor from RNP straight-line analysis using 1.151 method

parameters.name: RNP_1hr
parameters.description: RNP at tc = 1 hour from IARF line

functions.name: P365.RTA.ArpsBExponent
functions.description: Estimate Arps b-factor from three rate-time points using finite differences on ln(q)

functions.name: P365.RTA.KhFromPSSRNP
functions.description: kh product from PSS rate-normalized pressure for a gas well (mD*ft)

functions.name: P365.EoS.PR.WilsonK
functions.description: Wilson K-values as initial guess: Ki = (Pci/P) * exp(5.373*(1+omega_i)*(1-Tci/T))

functions.name: P365.EoS.PR.StabilityTest
functions.description: Michelsen (1982) tangent-plane distance stability test. Returns {stable, sumW_L, sumW_V, tpdL, tpdV, iterations}

parameters.name: kij_arr
parameters.description: Binary interaction parameters (n x n matrix, optional)

functions.name: P365.PTA.Interference.TransientPressure
functions.description: Pressure drop at observation well r due to production at active well (line-source Ei solution) (psia)

functions.name: P365.PTA.Interference.Permeability
functions.description: Estimate permeability from interference test pressure response by bisection (mD)

functions.name: P365.PTA.Interference.Storativity
functions.description: Estimate storativity (phi*ct) from interference test: phi*ct = x * k * t / (948 * mu * r^2)

parameters.name: x_ei
parameters.description: Ei argument value at observation point

functions.name: P365.PTA.PulseTest.Amplitude
functions.description: Pulse test pressure response amplitude using Ei superposition (psia)

functions.name: P365.PTA.PulseTest.Permeability
functions.description: Estimate permeability from pulse test amplitude by bisection (mD)

functions.name: P365.PTA.PulseTest.Storativity
functions.description: Estimate storativity from pulse test lag time: phi*ct = 948*k*t_L/(mu*r^2*x_L)

parameters.name: x_L
parameters.description: Dimensionless lag time (default 0.28 for first odd pulse, optional)

functions.name: P365.VFP.PoettmannCarpenter.Gradient
functions.description: Poettmann-Carpenter (1952) homogeneous multiphase pressure gradient (psi/ft) for oil wells

functions.name: P365.VFP.PoettmannCarpenter.BHP
functions.description: Poettmann-Carpenter (1952) bottomhole pressure (psia) integrating over 10 segments

functions.name: P365.VFP.DunsRos.Gradient
functions.description: Duns-Ros (1963) multiphase pressure gradient (psi/ft) — three flow regions: bubble/slug/mist

functions.name: P365.VFP.DunsRos.BHP
functions.description: Duns-Ros (1963) bottomhole pressure (psia)

functions.name: P365.VFP.Orkiszewski.Gradient
functions.description: Orkiszewski (1967) composite multiphase pressure gradient (psi/ft) — Griffith-Wallis bubble/slug + Duns-Ros mist

functions.name: P365.VFP.Orkiszewski.BHP
functions.description: Orkiszewski (1967) bottomhole pressure (psia)

functions.name: P365.EoS.SRK.AB
functions.description: Soave-Redlich-Kwong (1972) pure-component attraction parameter a (psia·ft⁶/lbmol²) and co-volume b (ft³/lbmol) at (T,P)

functions.name: P365.EoS.SRK.ZFactor
functions.description: Soave-Redlich-Kwong (1972) compressibility factor Z for a pure component

functions.name: P365.EoS.SRK.FugacityCoefficient
functions.description: SRK fugacity coefficient φ for a pure component given Z, A, B: ln φ = (Z-1) - ln(Z-B) - (A/B)·ln(1+B/Z)

functions.name: P365.EoS.SRK.MixAB
functions.description: SRK mixture dimensionless A and B parameters using van der Waals mixing rules

functions.name: P365.EoS.SRK.BubblePoint
functions.description: SRK bubble-point pressure (psia) for a feed composition at temperature T via successive substitution

functions.name: P365.EoS.SRK.DewPoint
functions.description: SRK dew-point pressure (psia) for a feed composition at temperature T via successive substitution

functions.name: P365.EoS.SRK.Flash
functions.description: SRK two-phase isothermal flash — returns vapour fraction, liquid/vapour compositions x[], y[], and Z-factors

functions.name: P365.EoS.SRK.PenelouxShift
functions.description: Peneloux (1982) volume shift correction: Σ zi·ci (ft³/lbmol) — subtract from SRK molar volume to correct liquid density

parameters.name: ZRA_i
parameters.description: Rackett compressibility factors (optional, estimated from Yamada-Gunn if absent)

functions.name: P365.PVT.Condensate.WellstreamGravity
functions.description: Recombined wellstream specific gravity (air=1) from separator gas gravity, condensate gravity, and CGR

functions.name: P365.PVT.Condensate.WetGasCorrectedGravity
functions.description: Correct separator gas gravity for NGL content using Standing (1977) wet-gas correction

functions.name: P365.PVT.Condensate.FVF
functions.description: Condensate formation volume factor (RB/STB) using Standing (1947) correlation for gas condensate

functions.name: P365.PVT.Condensate.Density
functions.description: Condensate density at reservoir conditions (lb/ft³)

functions.name: P365.PVT.Condensate.Viscosity
functions.description: Condensate viscosity (cp) at reservoir conditions — Beggs-Robinson dead oil corrected by Chew-Connally for dissolved gas

functions.name: P365.PVT.Condensate.WhitsonC7PlusSplit
functions.description: Whitson (1983) C7+ gamma-distribution split into nComp pseudocomponents — returns {Mw, gamma, Tc_R, Pc_psia, omega, z_frac} array

functions.name: P365.EoS.PR.PhaseEnvelopePoint
functions.description: Bubble-point pressure (psia) at a given temperature for PR phase envelope tracing

functions.name: P365.EoS.PR.PhaseEnvelopeDewPoint
functions.description: Dew-point pressure (psia) at a given temperature for PR phase envelope tracing

functions.name: P365.EoS.PR.PhaseEnvelope
functions.description: Full P-T phase envelope for a multi-component mixture using PR EoS — returns array of {T_R, Pb_psia, Pd_psia}

functions.name: P365.EoS.PR.Cricondentherm
functions.description: Cricondentherm — maximum temperature on the PR phase envelope (binary search)

functions.name: P365.EoS.PR.Cricondenbar
functions.description: Cricondenbar — maximum pressure on the PR phase envelope (golden-section search)

functions.name: P365.PTA.MultiRateRNP
functions.description: Rate-normalized pressure (RNP) for multi-rate production history using superposition in time

functions.name: P365.PTA.LogLogDiagnostic
functions.description: Log-log diagnostic data: ΔP and Bourdet derivative ΔP' for pressure-transient log-log plot

parameters.name: L
parameters.description: Bourdet smoothing parameter (fraction of log-cycle, default 0)

functions.name: P365.PTA.Deconvolution
functions.description: Simplified von Schroeter-Hollender deconvolution: unit-rate pressure response from variable-rate data with Tikhonov regularization

functions.name: P365.FRAC.TSODesign
functions.description: Tip screen-out (TSO) fracture design — estimates fracture dimensions and proppant packing at screenout

functions.name: P365.FRAC.ProppantConcentration
functions.description: Proppant areal concentration (lbm/ft²) and fill fraction in the fracture during pumping

functions.name: P365.FRAC.RefracScore
functions.description: Re-fracturing candidate score (0–100) based on PI decline, pressure retention, skin, and well age

functions.name: P365.WPA.FiveSpotAllocation
functions.description: Five-spot pattern injection allocation by kh connectivity — distributes injection proportionally to kh

parameters.name: q_inj_STBd
parameters.description: Total injection rate for the pattern (STB/d)

functions.name: P365.WPA.PatternFloodBalance
functions.description: Pattern flood injection balancing — computes injector rates to achieve target VRR

functions.name: P365.WPA.DykstraParsonsMobility
functions.description: Dykstra-Parsons volumetric sweep efficiency for a stratified reservoir flood

functions.name: P365.WPA.StilesSweep
functions.description: Stiles (1949) layer-by-layer flood sweep efficiency for a stratified reservoir

functions.name: P365.VFP.AzizGovierFogarasi.Gradient
functions.description: Aziz-Govier-Fogarasi (1972) two-phase pressure gradient (psi/ft). Uses dimensionless velocity numbers and the AGF flow-pattern map to identify bubble, slug, churn, or mist flow and compute the pressure gradient.

functions.name: P365.VFP.AzizGovierFogarasi.BHP
functions.description: Aziz-Govier-Fogarasi (1972) bottomhole pressure (psia). Integrates AGF two-phase gradient over tubing length with linear temperature profile.

functions.name: P365.PTA.MDHAnalysis
functions.description: Miller-Dyes-Hutchinson (MDH) pressure buildup analysis. Fits the semi-log straight line to compute permeability, skin, and P1hr from shut-in time vs. pressure data.

functions.name: P365.PTA.HornerAnalysis
functions.description: Horner pressure buildup analysis. Fits Pws vs. log[(tp+Δt)/Δt] to compute permeability, skin, and p* (static reservoir pressure).

functions.name: P365.PTA.WellboreStorageDiagnostic
functions.description: Wellbore storage log-log diagnostic. Identifies the unit-slope region to estimate the wellbore storage coefficient C (bbl/psi) and dimensionless storage CD.

functions.name: P365.EoS.LeeKesler.ZFactor
functions.description: Lee-Kesler (1975) BWR-type Z-factor for simple fluid (ω=0) or reference fluid (n-octane). Used as basis for the three-parameter Pitzer correlation.

functions.name: P365.EoS.LeeKesler.ZFactorComponent
functions.description: Lee-Kesler Z-factor for a real component using Z = Z^(0) + (ω/ωR)(Z^(R)−Z^(0)).

functions.name: P365.EoS.LeeKesler.DepartureEnthalpy
functions.description: Lee-Kesler departure enthalpy (H−H^ig)/(R·Tc) in dimensionless form for simple or reference fluid.

functions.name: P365.EoS.LeeKesler.DepartureEntropy
functions.description: Lee-Kesler departure entropy (S−S^ig)/R in dimensionless form.

functions.name: P365.EoS.LeeKesler.DepartureFunctions
functions.description: Lee-Kesler Z, departure enthalpy, and departure entropy for a real component using the Pitzer three-parameter correlation. Returns { Z, H_dep_RTc, S_dep_R }.

functions.name: P365.GEO.MohrCoulombFailureEnvelope
functions.description: Mohr-Coulomb shear failure envelope. Computes shear strength at a given normal stress, failure plane angle, UCS, and differential stress at failure for a rock with cohesion C0 and friction angle φ.

functions.name: P365.GEO.ECD
functions.description: Equivalent Circulating Density (ECD) using Bingham plastic annular pressure loss model. Returns ECD (ppg), annular pressure loss (psi), and ECD gradient (psi/ft).

functions.name: P365.GEO.MudWeightWindowECD
functions.description: Safe drilling mud weight window including ECD check. Returns minimum/maximum MW (ppg), recommended MW, ECD, and stability flag.

functions.name: P365.VFP.OptimalTubing
functions.description: Optimal tubing ID selection. Scans candidate tubing inside diameters and returns BHP for each using Beggs & Brill, identifying the ID that minimizes BHP for maximum deliverability.

functions.name: P365.VFP.GLROptimal
functions.description: Optimal Gas-Liquid Ratio (GLR) scan for a flowing well. Scans GLR from min to max and computes VLP BHP at each point, returning the GLR that minimises BHP (optimal artificial lift GLR).

functions.name: P365.VFP.ChokeDP
functions.description: Choke (bean) pressure drop using the Gilbert (1954) critical-flow correlation for multiphase flow. Returns upstream pressure, pressure drop, GLR, and critical flow flag.

parameters.name: d_choke_64ths
parameters.description: Bean/choke size in 64ths of an inch

functions.name: P365.PTA.DualPorosityPwf
functions.description: Dual-porosity (naturally fractured) drawdown pressure using the Warren-Root / Barenblatt-Kazemi model with storativity ratio (omega) and interporosity flow coefficient (lambda).

functions.name: P365.PTA.RadialComposite
functions.description: Radial composite (two-zone) reservoir wellbore pressure. Inner zone (k1, r_f) and outer zone (k2 = k1/M12) with mobility ratio M12. Uses Ei-function approximation.

functions.name: P365.PTA.TypeCurveMatch
functions.description: Pressure transient type-curve matching parameter extraction. Given match-point coordinates from a Bourdet-Gringarten type curve, back-calculates permeability (k), skin (S), and wellbore storage (C).

parameters.name: tD_CD_match
parameters.description: Dimensionless time ratio at match point

parameters.name: dt_match_hr
parameters.description: Actual elapsed time at match point (hours)

parameters.name: dP_match_psi
parameters.description: Actual pressure change at match point (psi)

parameters.name: CD
parameters.description: Dimensionless wellbore storage from type curve

functions.name: P365.EoS.LKMixturePseudoCriticals
functions.description: Lee-Kesler / Kay's rule mixture pseudocritical properties. Computes mole-fraction-weighted Tc_mix (K), Pc_mix (bar), and omega_mix for a multi-component gas mixture.

functions.name: P365.EoS.LKMixtureZ
functions.description: Lee-Kesler Z-factor for a multi-component gas mixture using Kay's rule pseudocriticals and the Pitzer three-parameter BWR correlation.

functions.name: P365.EoS.LKMixtureProperties
functions.description: Lee-Kesler mixture thermodynamic properties: Z-factor, dimensionless departure enthalpy (H-H^ig)/(RTc), and departure entropy (S-S^ig)/R using Kay's rule pseudocriticals.

functions.name: P365.GEO.DeviatedKirsch
functions.description: Deviated wellbore Kirsch stress analysis. Computes min/max hoop stresses, wellbore breakdown pressure (tensile fracture), and collapse pressure (Mohr-Coulomb) for an arbitrarily inclined borehole.

functions.name: P365.GEO.FaultReactivation
functions.description: Fault reactivation critical pore pressure (Mohr-Coulomb on fault plane). Returns normal stress, shear stress, critical pore pressure for slip, safety margin, and reactivation flag.

functions.name: P365.SIM.StarsGrid
functions.description: CMG STARS GRID CART + DI/DJ/DK keyword block generator. Creates grid dimension and cell size keywords for a Cartesian simulation grid. Supports uniform or heterogeneous cell spacing.

parameters.name: nx
parameters.description: Number of grid blocks in I direction

parameters.name: ny
parameters.description: Number of grid blocks in J direction

parameters.name: nz
parameters.description: Number of grid blocks in K direction

parameters.name: dx
parameters.description: Cell size(s) in I direction (ft) — scalar or array

parameters.name: dy
parameters.description: Cell size(s) in J direction (ft) — scalar or array

parameters.name: dz
parameters.description: Cell size(s) in K direction (ft) — scalar or array

functions.name: P365.SIM.StarsPoro
functions.description: CMG STARS PORO keyword block generator. Creates the porosity table for a Cartesian simulation grid. Accepts a uniform value or a full nx×ny×nz array.

functions.name: P365.SIM.StarsPerm
functions.description: CMG STARS PERMI/PERMJ/PERMK keyword block generator. Creates I, J, and K permeability tables for a simulation grid. Accepts scalar or array inputs for each direction.

functions.name: P365.SIM.StarsTemp
functions.description: CMG STARS TEMPI (initial temperature) keyword block generator for thermal simulation. Creates initial temperature distribution table. Accepts a uniform value or a full nx×ny×nz array.
